data.body: #685 PS3 came back L-V-. Verified-1 = FLAKE (unrelated integration test_import_batch_resume::test_benchmark_commit_count_is_ceil_per_pass, git 'bad tree object HEAD' concurrency flake — not op-cert). LLM-Review-1 = 2 REAL security findings in 8d8e local verify path verify_opcert_record (_opcert_signing.py): (A) calls registry.verify directly — only checks SSHSIG signature, NOT the signed subject binding; (B) verify_opcert_record + compute_validity source material/manifest from attacker-writable plaintext record, not the signed envelope payload (finding-#4 class, local path). #686 ee0b is L+V+ (green). Fixing findings -> #685 PS4 (fresh CI clears flake) -> rebase #686 -> re-vote. Dispatching security fix.
